name: Apex Treasury Corp
business: Apex Treasury Corp is a blank check company formed to effect a merger or acquisition with one or more businesses. It has no operations and has generated no revenue to date. It is a shell company.

exposures.sentence: We may pursue an initial Business Combination in any business or industry but we expect to target opportunities and companies that are in the blockchain & digital assets, crypto treasury strategies, AI, B2B software, data services, renewable energy, and build-to-rent real estate assets sectors.

catalysts.event: Deadline to complete initial business combination
catalysts.sentence: We have 24 months from the closing of our initial public offering ( IPO or Initial Public Offering ), or until such earlier liquidation date as our board of directors may approve (the Completion Window ), to complete our initial Business Combination.
